_seed_meta.description: To assign a risk level to an award

items.name: NOA Risk Analysis
items.description: To assign a risk level to an award

data.prompt: Using "Risk_Domains.docx" evaluate the risk of the attached Notice of Award

steps.name: Present the results as a table

data.prompt: Please provide the results as a table with risk in one column and the amount of risk on a scale of 1-5 in the next column.  1 is low risk and 5 is high risk.  Provide the results as a markdown table.
